title: HYP: TPB BTCUSDT 4h - Native 4h pullback avoids cross-TF frequency starvation
content: TrendPullbackEngine at native 4h. All prior TPB tests were on 1h with a 4h bias filter, causing frequency starvation (n=2-32 per draw). At native 4h, the EMA50>EMA200 bias check uses the same 4h bars being traded - no cross-TF lookup bottleneck. Expected n=15-50 trades over 28-month window (fewer than 1h but above threshold if selectivity is right). Mechanism: EMA50>EMA200 trend confirmation, pullback to EMA20 within pullbackTouchAtr*ATR, reclaim candle quality gate (composite score >= 0.55), TP1 break-even shift + runner. Key params: adxEntryMin (trend strength), stopAtrBuffer (stop placement), tp1R (first target). Prediction: EDGE_PRESENT in 2024 trending regime. Risk: n may still be too low for V11 threshold (n>=100); 4h TPB may need 3+ years of data. Will falsify if null-screen shows PF<0.80 across all draws OR n_trades<15 per draw.

structured_data.mechanism: EMA50>EMA200 trend + EMA20 pullback + reclaim candle quality gate, TP1 break-even

prior_evidence.TPB_1h: DISCARD - frequency starved (n=2-32 per draw; 4h bias filter bottleneck)

structured_data.expected_outcome: EDGE_PRESENT - 4h native avoids cross-TF frequency bottleneck; trend-following in 2024 BTC; pullback quality gate filters noise
structured_data.falsification_condition: If null-screen shows PF<0.80 across all draws OR n_trades<15 per draw (insufficient for V11 n>=100 in full sweep)
